## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] All linked features/tasks completed
- [ ] Tested on gamepad and keyboard+mouse
- [ ] No performance regression (60 FPS maintained)
- [ ] Consistent with CONCEPT.md design
- [ ] Documentation updated (if needed)

## Definition of Done

- [ ] All features implemented and tested
- [ ] Code reviewed
- [ ] Documentation updated
- [ ] Design alignment confirmed
- [ ] Ready for playtesting
